summary: Bug fix verification testing - Both bug fixes VERIFIED and working correctly. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working including logout, manual ticket entry, navigation, and flight status. No issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: Logout now uses 'typeof document !== undefined' instead of 'Platform.OS === web' - works correctly on web
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: PDF parse endpoint uses pdfplumber to extract text from PDFs before sending to GPT-5.2 - backend tests confirm functionality
All interactive elements have proper testID attributes for testing
Auth flow working correctly with JWT tokens
Manual ticket entry creates and persists tickets successfully
Tab navigation working across all 3 tabs (My Tickets, Flight Status, Profile)
Flight status API returns expected mocked response when API key not configured
All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
No HTML elements found (div, span, p) - proper React Native implementation
seed_data_creation: Demo user (9999999999/123456) with 3 sample tickets verified. Test ticket (TESTPNR/TA123) created during manual entry testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Both bug fixes verified and working. Logout uses window.location.href='/' for clean redirect on web. PDF parsing uses pdfplumber to extract text before sending to GPT-5.2. All core features tested: login, logout, dashboard, ticket CRUD, manual entry, flight status, tab navigation. No issues found.

logout_fix.description: Changed from Platform.OS === 'web' to typeof document !== 'undefined'
logout_fix.test_result: Successfully redirects to login screen after logout on web preview

pdf_parse_fix.description: Backend now uses pdfplumber to extract text from PDFs, then sends text to GPT-5.2 instead of sending PDF as image
pdf_parse_fix.test_result: PDF parse endpoint accepts PDF files, extracts text successfully, returns structured ticket data

backend_tests.auth: 7/7 passed - register, login, me, logout all working
backend_tests.tickets: 7/7 passed - CRUD operations with persistence verification
backend_tests.sample_data: 1/1 passed - demo user and 3 sample tickets verified
backend_tests.pdf_parse: 3/3 passed - endpoint auth, PDF parsing, image parsing all working

frontend_tests.login: PASSED - Demo credentials work, redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.logout: PASSED - BUG FIX VERIFIED - Redirects to login screen correctly
frontend_tests.dashboard: PASSED - Shows all tickets (3 sample + 1 test ticket)
frontend_tests.ticket_detail: PASSED - Opens when clicking ticket card
frontend_tests.add_ticket_screen: PASSED - All 4 upload options visible and accessible
frontend_tests.manual_entry: PASSED - Form works, saves ticket, redirects to dashboard
frontend_tests.ticket_persistence: PASSED - New ticket (TESTPNR) appears on dashboard under UPCOMING
frontend_tests.flight_status_tab: PASSED - Search works, shows expected mocked API response
frontend_tests.tab_navigation: PASSED - All 3 tabs accessible and functional

mocked_apis.aviationstack: Flight status API returns 'api_key_required' message - expected behavior, not a bug
